name: Aircall
description: Developer of a cloud-based call center and phone system designed to facilitate remote communication between the customers. The company's voice platform integrates seamlessly with popular productivity tools as well as monitors individual and team metrics in real-time to start making measurable improvements, enabling businesses to be better on customer support along with sales engagement.

name: Principly
description: Developer of an investment platform designed to guide college students to save money. The company's platform offers a simple, fast, and efficient way to create a college savings plan provides a link for family and friends to contribute easily, and allows for tax-free investment of savings, enabling parents and families to save smartly for their children's education and future.

name: BetterView Marketplace
description: Developer of a property intelligence and risk management platform designed for property and casualty (P&C) insurers. The company's platform identifies and mitigates risk, improves operational and inspection efficiency, and builds a more transparent customer experience throughout the policy lifecycle, empowering insurers to automate pricing, underwriting and renewal while focusing strategic action on critical properties.

name: Concepts
description: Developer of a concept-building application platform intended to be used for sketching and designing real-life things via mobile application. The company specializes in vector-based math, intuitive interfaces and new tech, enabling users to design anything they feel like through mobile phones.

name: Datasembly
description: Developer of a data analytics platform designed to offer real-time data to make real-life decisions. The company offers a data-as-a-service model by leveraging natural language processing and machine learning techniques to transform disparate data into organized information, enabling clients to get in-store and real-time, pricing, promotions and availability data, without stepping foot in a store.

name: Havenly
description: Provider of interior designing services intended to offer a guide to decorating homes. The company offers a platform that assists to select a designer, personalizing the design, collaborating on ideas, visualizing the room, chatting with a professional for further advice, and making the purchase, enabling people to have a cost-effective way to redesign their homes.

name: Kudobuzz
description: Operator of a digital marketing agency intended to help brands connect with large audiences. The company's services include increasing organic traffic by optimizing the site, helping to increase brand awareness, improving search engine optimization and building high-quality backlinks, enabling brand owners to deliver inbound traffic, increase search visibility, and reach out to customers.

name: Remitbee
description: Developer of a financial platform designed for cross-currency money transfer transactions. The company's money transfer platform offers a user-friendly service in which customers can send money online using their web browsers, tablets and mobile phones, enabling users to easily send money straight from their bank accounts and cash accounts worldwide.

name: Sajilni
description: Developer of event management platform designed to help in event management and ticket booking. The company's platform helps event promoters and venue owners create, promote, sell and manage events online and increase ticket sales, it also helps to manage attendees, extract reports and send invitations to all kinds of events, providing event organizers with a complete event management platform that is simple, convenient and easy to use.

name: Encore HQ
description: Provider of social media analytics platform for advertisers. The company's platform helps enterprise brands and advertisers to collect, curate and amplify their customer-generated marketing and advertisement content.

name: Stamplay
description: Developer of a cloud-based application programming interface platform designed to automate business operation. The company's platform facilitates digitize operation by creating workflows that map to real business processes and eliminate the lag between getting information from one department to the next, enabling developers from different sectors like, consumer support, sales, operation, marketing, human resource and finance to create web applications without writing back-end codes and eliminate manual work.

name: Pacifica Labs
description: Developer of a mental health application designed to help people by giving them the most effective and empowering tools available to manage their stress and anxiety. The company's mental health application is based on Cognitive Behavioral Therapy with relaxation and wellness techniques which are distilled down into simple, quick, daily activities to provide a way for people to track their progress, helping them address stress, anxiety and depression at a gradual pace.

name: AutoLotto
description: Provider of mobile lottery services intended to help the lottery industry win over millennials. The company's mobile application Tap, tap, ticket, enables users to buy tickets from their smartphone and scan a paper ticket purchased in-store to track it and get notifications if they win, eliminating lost tickets and the need to track down results and ensuring safety and security by verifying user identity, location and age to provide the best and most-legitimate mobile lottery experience.

name: Baker Technologies
description: Provider of a customer engagement and marketing (CRM) automation platform for the cannabis industry. The company's CRM platform helps dispensaries generate more revenue and build relationships with their customers through a variety of products featuring online ordering, customer loyalty, messaging, and analytics, enabling dispensaries to generate more revenue, optimize sales and increase customer retention in the burgeoning industry.
